tagline: Bridging Molecular Engineering and Neural Computing Systems
missionStatement: Our lab focuses on the translation of tissue-engineered scaffolds, medical-grade extracellular matrices, and modern hardware-software interfaces to capture, quantify, and simulate biological intelligence.
researchInterests: Downstream processing of Type I Medical-Grade Collagen
EEG signal processing and cognitive load quantification
Biocompatible polymer mechanics and tissue scaffolding
